account_theme: Mobile workflow verification — Instagram profile operations
buyer_message: retention.sh replays the cheapest valid path and audits shortcut validity before reuse — 78.5% token savings on this workflow after 8 replays
competitive_context: Unlike full-crawl-every-time approaches (BrowserStack, Momentic, manual QA), TA captures the trajectory once and replays the cheapest valid path. Each rerun gets cheaper as the trajectory stabilizes.
next_steps: Schedule 4-week paid pilot around 2-3 high-friction workflows
Prove rerun economics on customer's own app
Deliver weekly savings report via dashboard
